mapper.sql: id, user_id, current_job_name, matched_job_id, recommended_path_id, to_job_id, to_job_name, transition_difficulty, required_skills_gap, match_score, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_career_plan.user_transition_path_recommendations WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY match_score DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_career_plan.user_transition_path_recommendations SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
